title: marketing — declared entitlements
description: Nine entitlement keys. `marketing_capture` is the boolean master gate. `marketing_provider_slot` caps provider configs per tenant. `marketing_event_slot_per_month` caps captured events per rolling calendar month (breach after which capture returns 402). `marketing_advanced_providers` unlocks LinkedIn / Snapchat / Pinterest / GTM Server on Medium+. `marketing_test_mode` (all tiers) enables the test-event flow. `marketing_roas_report` unlocks the ROAS dashboard on Medium+. `marketing_dead_letter_replay` unlocks manual dead-letter replay on Enterprise. `marketing_custom_webhook` unlocks the generic HMAC-signed webhook driver on Medium+. `marketing_extended_retention` unlocks 10-year retention on Enterprise (default 7).

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. Off = the whole module is invisible: no capture, no dispatch, no provider CRUD. All tiers get this on — Small tenants get a reduced provider set via marketing_advanced_providers = 0.
enforcedBy: marketing.enforce_consent + entitlement.enforce:marketing_capture middleware on every /api/v1/marketing/* route
MarketingEventObserver refuses capture when the gate is closed
SDUI marketing surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'marketing.core'

entitlements.description: How many marketing provider configs a tenant can have. Small: 1 (Meta or Google Ads only). Medium: 3. Enterprise: unlimited. Consumed on provider config create; released on soft-delete.

How many marketing events a tenant may capture per rolling calendar month. Small: 10k, Medium: 100k, Enterprise: unlimited. Consumed on event capture; resets on the 1st of each calendar month via a scheduled reset job in the entitlements module.
enforcedBy: MarketingEventObserver.creating consumes 1 unit; refuses with MARKETING_EVENT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED when cap reached

entitlements.description: Enables LinkedIn Insight, Snapchat CAPI, Pinterest CAPI, and GTM Server providers. Small tenants get only Meta CAPI / Google Ads / GA4 / Custom Webhook (4 providers). Medium + Enterprise get all 9.
enforcedBy: MarketingProviderConfigObserver.creating refuses when provider IN ('linkedin_insight', 'snapchat_capi', 'pinterest_capi', 'gtm_server') AND gate is closed
SDUI provider picker filters the provider list per this gate

entitlements.description: Enables the test-event flow (per-provider sandbox dispatch). All tiers get this — tenants need to validate credentials during onboarding.
enforcedBy: SDUI test-provider button hidden when gate is closed
POST /providers/{provider}/test returns 402 when gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enables the ROAS report dashboard + GET /api/v1/marketing/roas endpoint + marketing:roas-report Artisan command. Medium + Enterprise.
enforcedBy: MarketingRoasReportReadyNotification only fires on tier with this gate

entitlements.description: Enables manual dead-letter replay via POST /api/v1/marketing/dead-letters/{id}/replay. Enterprise-only — Small + Medium tenants see dead-letters (read-only) but cannot replay. Platform ops can replay any dead-letter cross-tenant regardless.
enforcedBy: SDUI replay button hidden when gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enables the generic HMAC-signed CustomWebhook provider driver. Escape hatch for tenants using Segment / Rudderstack / custom analytics warehouses. Medium + Enterprise.
enforcedBy: MarketingProviderConfigObserver.creating refuses when provider = 'custom_webhook' AND gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Extends marketing_events retention from 7 years to 10 years (some financial-audit regimes require > 7). marketing_deliveries + marketing_dead_letters retention windows remain fixed at 2 years + indefinite respectively.
enforcedBy: PurgeExpiredMarketingDataJob checks this gate + applies 10-year retention when set
